title: Vigilance (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vigilance''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Vigilance (Venator-class)|'''''Vigilance''''']], a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Galactic Republic Navy|Republic Navy]] that was [[Commanding officer|commanded]] by [[Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Vigilance (Imperial-class Star Destroyer)|'''''Vigilance''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy]] that was commanded by [[Rae Sloane]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]''', a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]
*'''''[[Renthal's Vigilance]]''''', a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] originally named ''Vigilance''
*[[Vigilance (light cruiser)|'''''Vigilance''''']], a [[Light cruiser/Legends|light cruiser]]
*[[Vigilance (Venator-class)/Legends|'''''Vigilance''''']], a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Vigilance (Etti light cruiser)|'''''Vigilance''''']], an [[Etti light cruiser]]

{{Disambig}}
